title: Unification theory LCL S2E Cores Souls At Fields and
display_title: Unification theory LCL S2E Cores Souls At Fields and
wikitext:
[]: Unification theory: LCL, S2E, Cores, Souls At Fields and +.             Quote Post by sephirotic » Mon Jun 14, 2010 9:53 pm Unification theory: LCL, Super Solenoid, Cores, Souls, At-Fields, Lillith, Lilin etc etc.... (alternative to PWM and Red Space Theory) First of all, please try to keep on with the english, i've made some effort to keep it as understandable as possible, as i get some feedback, i'll try to corret mistakes and stranges ideas the best as i can. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I know an Unification theory sounds very Presumptuous, but oh well, is just a theory, i'll try to make it as less expeculative as possible so this don't become some kind of weird fanfic FAQ. It's still not 100% so i expect contributions to those who have the guts to read it to the end and be kind enough to point wholes and contributes with better ideas! Thanks in advance to all of you. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- Ok, i've read a little bit of Reichus theory about paralel universes where the Souls Are, and i've wondering myself about some gaps missing in the Core-Soul-LCL theories, so i've finally concluded some toughts, and theories i had carried around with me since i first saw Eva and started to discuss about it back in 1999. In my Unified theory i propose a new type of Energy: The energy of the Souls. This conception of soul as an energy form is what we need to link all the missing elements in a Unification theory. Presumptous? No doubt, if you are interested, try keeping with my bad english, and please, fell free to sugest alterations in whole sentences to make then more clear. So what is this all about? 0) First, what is "energy"? In our current classical conception, energy is basically matter in movement. Particles flying and boucing around, movement, nothing more. Eletrical energy is just eletrons changing from an atom to another, and the atoms theselves, have a special kind of melecule, called, gluons who ties together the quarks in each others core. 1)In evangelion however, there is another form of Energy, it is called, Life, or more specifically: The Souls. Those small red dots we see flying around are those energy in pure state, as we can see in the pictures bellow. [PICTURES OF PPL TURNING INTO TANG AND THE RED DOT'S BEING SEEN] [PICTURE OF THE SECOND IMPACTS WINGS, FULL OF SOULS AROUND IT] [ANY OTHER RANDOM NICE PIC OF FREE SOULS FLYING AROUND] However what is the main difference about the energy called Soul, and regular energy like eletricity, light, and gravity? Souls can manipulate matter giving it different shapes, and the most important part, souls can store data, information, memories. Classical energy as we know it doesn´t STORE data, only process it. This is an essential basis of this theory to explain how can one loses it own body in Eva and still keep its memories, even tough we know memories are supposely stored in proteins closed to the mielaninas in the brain's neurons. 2) How Souls manipulates matter? This is explained superficially in the series: somehow, there is a form of Solenoid wich has positive and negative "spins" that has the property of amplifying the manipulative property of the Energy called Souls. not only amplifying, but also housing it, so souls can occupy a determined space in the universe. We can see citations of the Solenoid and it's importance about the power related to souls and energy all over the series, i'll go in detail lates, but for start let's see some examples in the images bellows: [PICTURE OF SYNCRO GRAPHIC SHOWING THE SOLENOID OF SHINJIS AND UNIT 01 CORES] So, the Souls uses the catalitic property of super solenoids (double spirals/spin spirals) to amplify it's powers and manipulate matter. What is the first thing this Souls do? They give shape to a carbon based body. 3) Why carbon you ask? Because is what its primal "cores" are made: Double Heliocoidal Deoxyribonucleic acid Solenoids knowns as DNAs (and also RNAs). That's right, DNA and RNA are Two Heliocoidal groups of proteic Solenoids (carbon based). (not in the classical sense of Solenoid as a Coil, but as a series of loops) [PICTURE OF AN DNA MOLECULE] That's right, in the very beggining, 4 billions of years ago, when the first coacervates where floating around in the primordial soup, that was when lillith first arrived, BANG!, As a carrier of lot's of souls, inside her, those empties souls started to leave her body and float around in the primal soup, where they found the perfect place where they could habitate, some primitive inanimated Heliocoldal RNA in the coacervate of the Primitive earth: LCL. Those small RNAs, where very weak, but was enough to what the Souls needed to start gathering matter around it and form some more complexes strutures. This theory, of the LCL being identical as the original earth's ocean is supported by Maya in episode 20. This also explains why the Angels have 99% of DNA similar to that of the Evas, or better: OUR DNA, the same energy that arranged their molecules are our sharing vital energy: FAR's souls. (this is seen in episode 05) [IMAGE OF THE GRAPHICAL COMPARING DNA PATTERNS OF EVAS AND ANGELS] Ironically, in the current theory of the story of life, there is a missing link where biologist and chemics can't explain how the basic molecules from the primordial ocean, sundely became the complex strutures of the protoRNAs could code thenselves, and evolve, eva explain it by adding the influence of the Souls. Everything all right so far? So let's get a little more punk and talk about the Cores of Lillith and Adam. 4) What the Red Cores are all about? Simple, they are a extremely evolved, super condensed and complex form of Heliocoidal Solenoid, so evolved that it can house and amplify the energy of the Souls thousands of times stronger than of the simple DNAs that the souls were able to mount during they stay in earth. This explain lot's of things: 5) 1st, The "Thousand times stronger amplification" that the cores do, is nothing more than the ability of Angles and Evas to "EXPAND" it's A.T. Field, this is thanks to the core. 6) 2nd A.T. Field, "the barrier of the soul" is exactly what the name sugest: The power of the souls to manipulate matter, elevated to extreme levels, thanks to the amplification power of the cores. Is essentialy the same power that a soul have inside an DNA that can make it split in two and go through a crossover during the gametogenesis! [IMAGE OF AN ANIMATION OF THE PROCESS OF MEIOSIS] If we introduce an empty core in a human body, then a human would have power equal to an Angel. [FUNNY IMAGE FROM HIGURASHI's PARODY ON AT-FIELD] 7) Cores are made of carbon and LCL, just like the rest of the Angels and humans bodies, but only arranged in a much more complex form, that is why they contain LCL as we can see in these pictures: (that Reichu used to form her theory) [PICTURE OF LCL DRIPPING FROM UNIT'S 01 CORE] 8) The importance of cores also explains why to completely destroy an Angel, it must have it's core destroyed, the rest of the body is merely an "interface" to interact in more specifally ways with the exterior world, but as long as the soul resides in it's cores and have energy, it will be able to take any free carbon laying around and regenerate it's imaginative body. We can see this process in episode 19, how unit 01 needs a based matter of carbon to transform it in it's own left arm image. [PICTURE OF UNIT 01 REGENERATING IT'S OWN ARM] Ok, this thing is getting big, i'll stop for now and see what everyone has to say about all this, latter on i'll talk about HALL OF GALF (the suposedly dimension where souls lie, i have a different view that those of Reichu), S2 Engine, Soul spliting and unifing, Rei and Kaworu. Ow, please, help me make my text better correcting incomprehensive phares, and lame misspellings Thanks a lot! (i'll add images and more references latter on, i wan´t some feedback to better develop all this theory, this is just a draft after some years of toughts, reads and compilations)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 14, 2010 10:41 pm Reichu wrote: My ego obligates me to provide a link to the super-cool Reichu stuff mentioned: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=229844#229844

[]:             Quote Post by Adam's wristwatch » Mon Jul 23, 2012 10:21 pm I only heard about the PWM thing a few days ago. Before that I was just utterly confused about how Lilith could maintain her form without a soul. This led me to believe that the body produced the AT field, but that made no sense considering that humans reverted to LCL when they lost their souls. So maybe they came from cores and Lilith's was not visible? But then again, both Kaworu and Rei Produced insanely powerful AT Fields without any cores to speak of. And I always thought that Rei, Lilith and the Lilim were all made of the same matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 23, 2012 10:34 pm Adam's wristwatch wrote: I only heard about the PWM thing a few days ago. Before that I was just utterly confused about how Lilith could maintain her form without a soul. This led me to believe that the body produced the AT field, but that made no sense considering that humans reverted to LCL when they lost their souls. So maybe they came from cores and Lilith's was not visible? But then again, both Kaworu and Rei Produced insanely powerful AT Fields without any cores to speak of. And I always thought that Rei, Lilith and the Lilim were all made of the same matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Adam's wristwatch » Mon Jul 23, 2012 11:16 pm Monk Ed wrote: I've made a case in other threads that the AT Field, although created initially by the soul, does not need to be maintained by it and must be actively broken down by an outside force in order to be destroyed. You can find the most recent back-and-forth on that subject here . (It's decidedly out of place in that topic, I admit.) The orthodox theory is that all the non-Lilin entities in the show are made of "a type of matter characterized by particulate and wave-like properties, like light" as explained by Ritsuko in an early episode, and it is this substance which is responsible for the Angels' more powerful AT Fields as well as the fact that soulless bodies (such as the clones of Rei or the embryo of Adam or the original body of Lilith) don't disintegrate.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 23, 2012 11:26 pm Adam's wristwatch wrote: Oh, right, corpses. I forgot entirely about dead people. How the heck did I forgot about dead people in Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Adam's wristwatch » Mon Jul 23, 2012 11:57 pm Rei is still a bit of a special case though. Although it makes sense for the soul to remain in the body until physically destroyed. Now, did Adam's soul end up in GNR? And how?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 24, 2012 12:15 am Adam's wristwatch wrote: Now, did Adam's soul end up in GNR? And how?

[]:             Quote Post by Adam's wristwatch » Tue Jul 24, 2012 12:32 am Thank you, that was very helpful.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Jul 24, 2012 12:58 am Ornette wrote: The reasoning goes like this: Adam's soul is in Kaworu Kaworu dies, Adam's soul goes into embryo in Gendo's hand Gendo sticks hand + embryo in Rei Rei takes hand and embryo and merges with Lilith Lilith turns into GNR

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 24, 2012 7:25 pm My sole comment on this "red space" business: In NGE red is the color of Asuka, of pain, of maturity, of the real. If something is meant to be associated with embryonic souls, the time before birth, the as-yet-unawakened it should be blue . The fact that this space for unborn souls is red is at odds with all the other imagery in the show. Perhaps there's more to it? Or perhaps I'm just misinterpreting things; wouldn't be the first time!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 24, 2012 8:29 pm I'd be hard-pressed to simplify the color motifs like that ... mainly because they don't seem especially consistent. Blue is the color of the maternal waters in episode 20 -- but it's also the color of the open sky under which Shinji receives his congratulations. In episode 26', the world where Shinji is everywhere and nowhere is the red one. (It's so red, it's impossible to tell that Rei's hair is really blue.) Things turn blue when he decides that A.T. Fields should come back. It might be worth keeping in mind that both Asuka and Rei are red and blue. (Third girl Misato and Mother Figure Eva-01 are purple -- also red and blue.) But overall, I'd guess that red space is probably just that way to seem otherworldly, and because of the association between the color red and "life's essence". I mean, the oceans of Earth are blue, so what color are you going to make the extradimensional "ocean" that souls (and LCL -- lol) come from?

[]: Re: Unification theory: LCL, S2E, Cores, Souls At Fields and             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Wed Jul 25, 2012 11:25 am sephirotic wrote: The energy of the Souls energy is basically matter in movement
